findings.message: World scene must not contain XRInteractionManager. It must live only in _Boot (DontDestroyOnLoad).
No SpawnMarkerRuntime or __SPAWN_PLAYER found in scene.
No TravelCoordinator in scene. It may arrive as DontDestroyOnLoad from another scene, but verify patcher ran.
